scripts.generate: emfts-codegen generate -m src/model/management.ecore -c src/model/management.genconfig -o src/generated && emfts-codegen generate -m src/model/workflow-api.ecore -c src/model/workflow-api.genconfig -o src/generated && emfts-codegen generate -m src/model/rest-response.ecore -c src/model/rest-response.genconfig -o src/generated
